title: salvia yangii
intro: Salvia yangii, also known as blue sage, is a perennial plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Salvia yangii include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and support respiratory health. Salvia yangii can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
